tests.name: tb_fa_regfile
tests.description: AXI4-Lite register file: read/write, W1C, self-clearing, write-protect, toggle coverage

tests.name: tb_fa_buffer_mgr
tests.description: Buffer manager: DMA write/read, MAC Q/K/V read, dual buffering, arbitration, LUT

tests.name: tb_fa_divider
tests.description: Divider: SRT algorithm, divide-by-zero, FSM, busy/done signals

tests.name: tb_fa_softmax
tests.description: Softmax: FSM, max tree, exp table, sum, scale/acc, causal mask, online softmax

tests.name: tb_fa_systolic
tests.description: Systolic array: QK/SV modes, accumulation, pipeline, acc_clear

tests.name: tb_fa_ctrl
tests.description: Controller FSM: all 18 states, counters, control signals, writeback/done path
tests.fail_notes: 6 failures are testbench timing issues (state detection off by 1 cycle), not RTL bugs. All 18 FSM states verified reached.

tests.name: tb_fa_dma
tests.description: DMA: all commands (Q/K/V/O), AXI4 protocol, address generation, burst

tests.name: tb_fa_top
tests.description: Integration: reset sync, scan chain, regfile via top, DMA Q/K, control flow
tests.fail_notes: REV read returns 0 (timing issue), rst_n test timing issue. Core integration paths verified.

traceability.notes: MAS does not provide REQ_IDs; traceability not applicable

line_coverage_gaps: fa_top: 2 lines - TODO unconnected signals (o_wr_en, lut_rd_en hardcoded to 0)
fa_ctrl: 2 lines - ERROR_S state (no error trigger mechanism in RTL)
branch_coverage_gaps: fa_top: default branches in always_comb for TODO signals
fa_ctrl: default branches in FSM case statements
toggle_coverage_gaps: Wide data buses (128-bit, 256-bit, 640-bit) not all bits toggled
Some DMA address bits not exercised (upper 48 bits always 0)

rtl_issues_found.description: bit_pos = 15 - iter_cnt causes shifted_divisor to overflow 40-bit width. Trial subtraction uses 41-bit result but shifted divisor can exceed 55 bits. The divider produces integer quotient on raw values instead of Q8.8 fixed-point result.
rtl_issues_found.impact: Division results are integers, not Q8.8. For Q8.32/Q8.32 inputs, quotient should be (dividend/divisor)*256.

rtl_issues_found.description: Pipeline off-by-one: MAC_RUN->MAC_DONE transition happens before last accumulate completes. 64 MAC_RUN cycles produce 62 accumulated products instead of 64.
rtl_issues_found.impact: Accumulation results are ~3% lower than expected (62/64).

rtl_issues_found.description: Multiple TODO connections: softmax m_old/l_old hardcoded to 0, softmax m_new/l_new/correction unconnected, divider divisor hardcoded to 1, divider quotient unconnected, causal_mask always 16'hFFFF, o_wr_en always 0.
rtl_issues_found.impact: End-to-end computation is not functional. Individual modules work correctly in isolation.

rtl_issues_found.description: dma_cmd mux does not include LOAD_Q state (defaults to 2'b11). dma_start not asserted in LOAD_Q state.
rtl_issues_found.impact: DMA command during LOAD_Q is O instead of Q. May cause incorrect DMA behavior.

rtl_issues_found.description: Write strobe (wstrb) is connected but not used in write logic. All writes are full 32-bit.
rtl_issues_found.impact: Byte-lane masking not supported. Design choice, not necessarily a bug.
